## Summary

- What changed?
- Why does it belong in this repo?

## Scope

- [ ] New skill
- [ ] Existing skill update (`ship` or other)
- [ ] Repo-level docs or tooling

## Validation

- [ ] `python3 scripts/validate_catalog.py`
- [ ] `catalog.json` updated if a skill was added or renamed
- [ ] Install or usage example reviewed if public behavior changed

## Notes

- Any follow-up issues?
- Any release note impact?
